texto: There isn't a wife in the world who has not taken the exact measure of her husband weighed him and settled him in her own mind and knows him as well as if she had ordered him after designs and specifications of her own.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Charles Warner: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “There isn't a wife in the world who has not taken the exact measure of her husband weighed him an…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, marriage, there pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e reflexao.
